title: Dizziness / vertigo
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.
presenting_history.rationale: Supports mapped dizziness descriptors, episode timing, positional context, associated symptoms, and prior episodes.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness

red_flags.text: Defines Dubai telehealth dizziness scope and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.
red_flags.rationale: Reviewed to establish Dubai telehealth scope; no content items were mapped from scope alone.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines Dubai telehealth dizziness scope and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness

red_flags.text: Lists cardiac, neurologic, trauma, intoxication, visual, consciousness, and severe-headache concerns.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped cardiac, neurological, syncope, severe-headache, weakness, and persistent-vomiting warning fields.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists cardiac, neurologic, trauma, intoxication, visual, consciousness, and severe-headache concerns.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness

red_flags.text: Identifies emergency and specialist referral features for dizziness.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped return and escalation documentation only when discussed or arranged by the clinician.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Identifies emergency and specialist referral features for dizziness.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness

examination.text: Emphasises structured history and available examination to distinguish dizziness syndromes.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-assessed neurological, ear, positional, nystagmus, gait, balance, hearing, and vital-sign fields.
examination.evidence_extract: Emphasises structured history and available examination to distinguish dizziness syndromes.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness

examination.text: States that tests depend on history and examination and should be documented only when clinically deemed necessary.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-selected vital, neurological, ear, ECG, and glucose documentation fields.
examination.evidence_extract: States that tests depend on history and examination and should be documented only when clinically deemed necessary.

source_limitations: BPPV, vestibular neuritis, formal positional manoeuvres, mastoid or oropharyngeal examination, vestibular rehabilitation, fall-prevention content, and fixed one-to-two-week timing remain unsupported.
The BPPV or vestibular diagnosis label remains clinician-stated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
